title: viftyctl --json command error report
description: Machine-readable command or viftyctl run wrapper failure emitted by viftyctl when --json is present. safeToProceed is always false for this report.

coolingLeasePrepared.description: True only when viftyctl run successfully prepared a matching cooling lease before reporting this error.

autoRestoreAttempted.description: True when viftyctl run attempted to restore Auto after preparing a lease and then failing before the child workload could run.

autoRestoreSucceeded.description: null when no Auto restore was attempted; otherwise reports whether the run-wrapper cleanup restore succeeded.

generatedAt.description: Swift JSONEncoder date value emitted by the CLI.
